metadata.description: Structured taxonomy of query types for LLM routing, with complexity levels, model requirements, and benchmark coverage

categories.name: coding
categories.description: Code generation tasks: writing functions, classes, scripts from natural language specifications
examples: Write a Python function that merges two sorted lists
Create a REST API endpoint with FastAPI that handles user authentication
Implement a binary search tree in TypeScript

categories.name: math_reasoning
categories.description: Mathematical problem solving requiring multi-step reasoning, proofs, or numerical computation
examples: Solve: If f(x) = 3x^2 - 2x + 1, find f'(x) and the critical points
A train leaves station A at 60km/h. Another leaves B at 80km/h toward A. If A and B are 280km apart, when do they meet?
Prove that the sum of the first n odd numbers equals n^2

categories.name: creative_writing
categories.description: Open-ended creative text generation: stories, poetry, marketing copy, essays with stylistic requirements
examples: Write a short story about a robot discovering emotions, in the style of Asimov
Compose a professional LinkedIn post announcing a product launch
Write a persuasive essay on the benefits of remote work

categories.name: factual_qa
categories.description: Factual question answering requiring world knowledge, lookup, or retrieval from context
examples: What is the capital of Burkina Faso?
Explain the difference between TCP and UDP protocols
What were the main causes of the French Revolution?

categories.name: multi_step_reasoning
categories.description: Complex reasoning chains: logical deduction, planning, multi-hop inference, causal reasoning
examples: Given these 5 constraints, determine the optimal seating arrangement for 8 guests
Analyze the following business scenario and recommend a strategy with pros/cons
If all bloops are razzles and some razzles are lazzles, what can we conclude?

categories.name: summarization
categories.description: Condensing long documents, articles, or conversations into concise summaries
examples: Summarize this 10-page research paper in 3 bullet points
Provide an executive summary of this quarterly financial report
Summarize the key decisions from this meeting transcript

categories.name: translation
categories.description: Translating text between natural languages, preserving meaning, tone, and cultural nuance
examples: Translate this legal contract from English to French
Translate this Japanese manga dialogue to natural English
Convert this technical documentation from Chinese to English

categories.name: classification
categories.description: Categorizing inputs into predefined labels: sentiment analysis, topic classification, intent detection
examples: Classify this customer review as positive, negative, or neutral
Determine if this email is spam or legitimate
Categorize these support tickets by urgency: low, medium, high, critical

typical_model_requirements.min_capability: consistent structured output, low cost preferred

categories.name: conversation
categories.description: Multi-turn dialogue: chatbot interactions, assistants, roleplay, open-ended discussion
examples: Help me plan a two-week trip to Japan on a $3000 budget
Act as a career coach and help me prepare for a software engineering interview
Let's discuss the philosophical implications of artificial consciousness

typical_model_requirements.min_capability: high Chatbot Arena Elo (> 1300), good instruction following

categories.name: code_debugging
categories.description: Identifying and fixing bugs in existing code, explaining errors, suggesting fixes
examples: Why does this Python function return None instead of the expected list?
Fix the race condition in this Go concurrent code
This SQL query is slow on 1M rows — optimize it

task_type.description: Primary task type of the query

complexity.description: Estimated cognitive complexity — simple: single-step recall; medium: multi-step with clear structure; complex: open-ended reasoning or generation
